location: Dropped by the Death Rite Bird boss found across the road east of the Southern Aeonia Swamp Bank Site of Grace in Caelid; it only spawns at night.
tactics: Rest at Southern Aeonia Swamp Bank and, if it's daytime, wait/pass time at the grace until nightfall for the Death Rite Bird to spawn.
It's vulnerable to Holy damage and attacks with Magic-based ghostflame spells that can inflict Frostbite and Death Blight — bring magic resistance.
Don't confuse it with the weaker, common 'Deathbird' enemies scattered elsewhere in Caelid — only the named 'Death Rite Bird' variant drops this weapon.
lore: A barbed rod carried by the Deathbirds, keepers of graveyard fires who use it to rake the ashes and bones of the dead from their cremation kilns.

builds.name: Frostbite Strength/Dex Build
builds.why: Innate Frostbite buildup combined with D-rank Strength and Dexterity scaling suits a status-effect-focused melee build.

builds.name: Intelligence Skill-Spam Build
builds.why: Its Ghostflame Ignition skill scales strongly and purely with Intelligence (useful up to roughly 50 INT) even though the weapon's own Intelligence scaling is only E-rank.
